name: Cajun BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, black pepper, white pepper, onion powder, and garlic powder in a bowl. Mix well and set aside.
2. Cook bacon until crisp. Add onions and cover the pan. Cook until browned, without burning, and add the dry spice mixture. Heat for 1 minute.
3. Add remaining ingredients (beef stock, chili sauce, honey, orange juice, orange zest, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic puree, and butter). Stir and heat for 20-25 minutes until thickened.
4. Transfer the sauce to a food processor and process until smooth. Use as a mopping sauce or serve hot or warm as a dipping sauce.
